title: Revert order quantity to dynamic $10 per order default

requirements.text: In the backend trading loop (tradingLoop()), revert the order quantity calculation from the fixed 2 ICP (200_000_000 e8s) back to the original dynamic $10 per order formula: quantity = 10 / midPrice (in ICP terms, using the current mid-price). This dynamic calculation must be used as the default for all grid orders (both BUY and SELL sides) going forward.

quotes: volte para o padrão de 10 dollares como no inicio do projeto.. como padrão..

acceptanceCriteria: The trading loop no longer uses a hardcoded quantity of 200_000_000 e8s (2 ICP).
Each order quantity is computed as 10 / midPrice (representing $10 worth of ICP at current mid-price).
Both BUY and SELL grid orders use the same dynamic quantity formula.
The bot compiles and deploys without errors.
getLastGrid() returns orders with quantities reflecting the dynamic $10 calculation.

constraints: Do not implement any new features (smart grid repositioning, order comparison, etc.) in this change — revert only the quantity calculation.
Preserve all existing backend logic (cancelOrder loop, placeOrder calls, balance queries, config endpoints).
nonGoals: Smart grid repositioning (AR-4, AR-9) — this is a separate future feature.
Changes to spreadBps, numOrders, intervalSeconds defaults.
